hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path') or (d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('notebook_path',''); subprocess.run(['jupyter','nbconvert','--to','html','--execute',fp],check=True) if fp and fp.endswith('.ipynb') and os.path.exists(fp) else None" 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Executing notebook and converting to HTML...
